# Pricing — Acme Analytics

Simple, transparent pricing. Start free, upgrade when you grow.

## Starter

$0 / month

- Up to 1,000 events
- 1 team member
- Community support

Get started

## Pro

$49 / month

- Up to 100,000 events
- 10 team members
- Email support

Start free trial

## Enterprise

Custom pricing

- Unlimited events
- SSO & audit logs
- Dedicated success manager

Contact sales

Frequently asked questions

Can I change plans later? Yes, anytime from your account settings.
